name: Seasoning for Italian Sausage-Sweet
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill the meat to a temperature between 32-34°F before starting.
2. Grind the pork through either a 1/4-inch or 3/8-inch plate.
3. Gradually add all ingredients and mix thoroughly.
4. Stuff the mixture into hog casings sized from 32 to 356mm.
